About Me

I'm Dafa Hentra Anjana, a highly motivated finance student based on Yogyakarta, Indonesia.

I'm passionate about analyzing data and crafting clear, insightful financial reports. I thrive on presenting complex numbers through clean, structured layouts that help stakeholders make confident decisions.

As a finance enthusiast, my work focuses on interpreting market trends and building models that offer transparency and precision—because clear financial insight drives smarter strategies and better outcomes.

Download My CV

Experience

BRI Danareksa Sekuritas

(Apr 2026 - Present)

Equity Research, Intern

From drafting sector reports to initiating coverage on IDX-listed companies, I learned that good research is equal parts rigorous analysis and clear storytelling. I also integrated Python into our workflow to automate data retrieval, bridging the gap between financial insight and technical efficiency.

https://bridanareksasekuritas.co.id

Mandiri Sekuritas

(Mar 2026 - Present)

Retail & Distribution, Intern

Working directly with retail clients gave me a different lens on finance. Analyzing portfolios, crafting rebalancing strategies, and facilitating investment seminars taught me that beyond the numbers, finance is ultimately about building trust and helping people make confident decisions.

https://mandirisekuritas.co.id

FEB UGM

(Jan 2026 - Present)

Teaching Assistant

Standing on the other side of the classroom changed how I think about knowledge. Guiding students through business process frameworks and weekly tutorials sharpened my ability to break down complexity and communicate it clearly, a skill I carry into every professional setting.

https://feb.ugm.ac.id

Sector Seven Coffee

(Dec 2025 - Present)

Finance Lead

I work in a fast-moving environment where decisions carry direct consequences. Building the venture has taught me how financial structure, governance, and disciplined judgment turn ideas into systems that sustain growth over time.

https://sectorseven.space

BNI Sekuritas

(May 2025 - Jul 2025)

Equity Research, Intern

I had the opportunity to dive into financials and market signals of IDX-listed firms, I uncovered patterns, valued stocks with DCF and comps, and crafted research that empowered management to act decisively in fast-moving market conditions.

https://bnisekuritas.co.id

GAOTek Inc.

(Jan 2025 - Apr 2025)

Business Development, Intern

My days were filled with reaching out, digging into industries, and keeping things organized. Between prospecting and research, I learned how to spot opportunities and keep the momentum going.

https://gaotek.com

BIMASAKTI FSAE Team

(Sep 2024 - Present)

Head of Business Plan

While engineers built the car, I built the story behind it—researching markets, modeling finances, and shaping a business plan that made our race car more than fast, but also financially and strategically driven.

https://bimasakti.ft.ugm.ac.id

BEM FEB UGM

(Mar 2024 - Dec 2024)

Finance & Administration

My first professional step was managing finances at BEM FEB—handling budgets, ensuring accurate reports, and streamlining cash flow, all while learning to balance responsibility with practical teamwork in a dynamic student organization.

https://bem.feb.ugm.ac.id
